name: Reference
description: This is a reference for the objects below, not a variant. Each field is an example or description of its content.
location: The line range where the component is located (e.g. #L10-L20 means the component is between line 10 and 20). The range may not be exact, so leave a margin of error.

name: Simple grid
description: Team section with regular evenly spaced grid for balanced card or item scanning.

name: Cards with bio
description: Team section with member cards with bio snippets and profile details.

name: Compact list
description: Team section with compact list layout for dense team directories.

name: Image overlay
description: Team section with team photos with text and actions over image overlays.

name: Primary background grid
description: Team section with stats presented on a strong primary-background grid.

name: Featured member split
description: Team section with split layout highlighting one featured member beside list.
